default.text:
# PROPERTY INSPECTION CHECKLIST

## Property Information

- **Address:** {{propertyAddress}}
- **Inspection Date:** {{inspectionDate}}
- **Inspection Type:** {{inspectionType}}
- **Inspector:** {{inspectorName}}
- **Tenant:** {{tenantName}}
- **Tenant Present:** {{tenantPresent}}

---

## EXTERIOR

- [ ] Exterior Walls - Check for cracks, damage, or needed repairs
- [ ] Windows (exterior) - Check seals, frames, and glass condition
- [ ] Entry Doors - Check locks, hinges, and weatherstripping
- [ ] Roof (visible) - Check for missing shingles or visible damage
- [ ] Gutters & Downspouts - Check for clogs and proper drainage
- [ ] Landscaping - Lawn, plants, trees condition

## INTERIOR - GENERAL

- [ ] Walls - Check for holes, cracks, stains
- [ ] Ceilings - Check for water stains, cracks, peeling
- [ ] Floors - Check flooring condition throughout
- [ ] Interior Doors - Check operation, locks, handles
- [ ] Windows (interior) - Check locks, screens, operation
- [ ] Light Fixtures - Check all fixtures and bulbs

## KITCHEN

- [ ] Cabinets - Check doors, drawers, hinges
- [ ] Countertops - Check for chips, stains, damage
- [ ] Sink & Faucet - Check for leaks, proper drainage
- [ ] Stove/Oven - Test all burners and oven
- [ ] Refrigerator - Check operation, seals, ice maker
- [ ] Dishwasher - Test operation and check for leaks

## BATHROOMS

- [ ] Toilet - Check flush operation and seals
- [ ] Sink & Faucet - Check for leaks and drainage
- [ ] Tub/Shower - Check caulking, tiles, drain
- [ ] Exhaust Fan - Test operation
- [ ] Mirror/Medicine Cabinet - Check condition and mounting

## BUILDING SYSTEMS

- [ ] HVAC System - Test heating and cooling
- [ ] Water Heater - Check operation and condition
- [ ] Electrical Panel - Check breakers and labeling
- [ ] Smoke Detectors - Test all detectors
- [ ] CO Detectors - Test carbon monoxide detectors

---

## NOTES

_________________________________________________________________

_________________________________________________________________

_________________________________________________________________

## SIGNATURES

_____________________________
Inspector Signature & Date

_____________________________
Tenant Signature & Date (if present)
